---
title: "practice"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-02"
---

# source()
```{r}
source("angling_prepartion.R")
```



# practice

```{r}
df$date <- factor(
  df$date,
  levels = c("9月27日_プレ", "10月4日", "10月5日", "10月17日", "10月19日", "10月24日"),
  ordered = TRUE
)


```


```{r}
df |> count(v6_fishing_days_last_season)
```
